input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.9 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.9
            TITLE: acceleration event

            CONTENT:
            rule D.9: ACCELERATION EVENT
D.9 ACCELERATION EVENT 
The Acceleration event evaluates the vehicle acceleration in a straight line on flat pavement.

final_answer: rule D.9: ACCELERATION EVENT D.9 ACCELERATION EVENT The Acceleration event evaluates the vehicle acceleration in a straight line on flat pavement.
